phrases.intent_en: Where is the Free Fall downhill start
phrases.cultural_note: Natives expect reference to the 'Free Fall-Park' as a landmark rather than micro-directions.

likely_response.translation_en: Start at the Free Fall park.

responses.english: Start at the Free Fall park.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Piz Nair summit cable car
phrases.text_local: Wo ist die Gondel zum Piz Nair?
phrases.cultural_note: Piz Nair summit is a well-known landmark; directions rely on signage to the cable car.

likely_response.translation_en: Right next to the base station.

responses.english: Right next to the base station.

phrases.intent_en: Can I book a guide for today
phrases.text_local: Kann ich heute einen Bergführer buchen?
phrases.cultural_note: Bergführer implies mountain guide service at the venue's official ski school or counter.

phrases.intent_en: Is the Engiadina women's course open
phrases.cultural_note: Course status is typically confirmed by staff at rental or lift counters.

phrases.intent_en: How do I validate my gondola ticket
phrases.text_local: Wie muss ich mein Gondelticket entwerten?
phrases.cultural_note: Validation typically occurs at unmanned kiosks or turnstiles near lift entrances.

likely_response.translation_en: At the machine before the gondola.

responses.english: At the machine before the gondola.
